meaning: n.故事,坏话,流言蜚语,谣言,叙述,传说
examples: He listened to my tale of woe.
She unfolded her tale to us.
He described it as an extraordinarily tangled and complicated tale.
It is a charming tale that any traveller with a healthy wanderlust would like to experience.
The whole tale of how people use the river is all there, at your feet.
